reviews.review_description: You can't move and you can't do literally nothing I mean WUTS THE FREAKING POINT OF GETTING THIS GAME I WISH I COULD RATE IT 0 STARS

reviews.review_title: Not For Games On Your Meta Headset
reviews.review_description:
This software is NOT for playing moving games.
If you are visiting an art gallery or a space where nothing moves, fine.
However, if you want to try and play a racing game or a sniper game. The app is completely useless and comes with zero instructions how to play.
Firstly, a racing game. “Sit Anywhere To Start The Game”. How do you sit down???
Secondly, a sniper game. How do you move the rifle or crosshairs to aim???

However, these games do work properly on your devices app if you download that too. Which kinda defeats the purpose for the Meta VR Headset, unless you are visiting spaces that are not games.
Bad game
four years ago it was a great community and now its empty and abanded because of petty greed and egocentric creators website is not working any more and all worlds are empty
Lags the headset a lot even when not using the app, the ui's are mostly bugged for me.
Beyond the menu everything is just black, no matter what I select
No instructions, just a very brief and inadequate tutorial. Buttons that you cannot click. Menus that are unusable, the pointer goes right through them.Maybe this works on the MetaQuest 3?

Creating a space and putting items in that space wasn’t too bad, but then inviting friends was extremely difficult. It allows you to send your friends an email link, but there’s no way for them to open that link directly in the Quest app. They have to register first, open the link in a 2d browser, favorite the space, link their quest with the 2d browser, then open spatial in the quest and finally open their favorite spaces. What a confusing disaster!
It won’t let me create an account the tutorial keep repeating the second I finish it, waste of storage
I loveeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee this game

reviews.review_title: Why is this on the App Store?
reviews.review_description:
Yet something else to clutter your uninstalled list! Couldn’t even get past the sign in.

How did  this even pass the App Stores requirements? 

It’s even worse than Bard Hero and Bard Hero was reaaaleeey bad!  

0 stars but I was forced to give one star to leave the review.
The Real-Node-LA is built in Spatial... count me in

One of the first things you have to do in this app is to sign in or create an account. But to do that, you have to pair with the numbers on screen. However I followed all the steps and  after creating an account it still wants me to pair. Couldn’t find anything in the app or the website to pair with.
Worlds do not load when picked, stuck in hone world. Boring
Perfect for creating spaces and worlds. Amazing!

I haven't used the app a ton, so I decided to give it another go. My user is already in the menu, click the button to log in, only to be told the server is offline. No way to check my credentials (shouldn't need to if they're stored locally anyway), no "try again later," just stuck in the start menu. Uninstalled.

This is the first time I've become really angry over an app. Paid my monies and theres nothinhlg!! The content buttons stay at the bottom. Got to crank my head and arm to reach. When i put on the browser,  the screen is so high i cant even see it and trying to click it off is a nightmare. Theres no extra environments to add. Just different colours. This is highly disappointing.  Cancelled subscription immediately.  Totally deflated.

Look up Altered Alley on this app. Search 
Hip Hop 
Lit
Skate
Altered Alley
BODO
Kim

Tattoo
Ai Tattoo
Haunted Alley
Kaveli White

And almost 700 other original other spaces that are truly much different than what you may have already seen.
There is no one actively using this app.
I had logged in, but they would not let me play, because there is no Verify Box on the Activation Page!
I love Spatial very much. I am a worldbuilder and enjoy the possibilities it offers. Also its multiplatform feature.
Loved this game
a sports

Try ENGAGE instead.  It has more cool features and is very user friendly.  You'll be up and running with video and objects and invited guests in minutes.  With Spatial you'll be lucky if you can get the browser working -- and I spent a frustrating and stressful two weeks trying to figure out Spatial with no luck.  Support is non-existent.  They kept scheduling a Zoom meeting with me and cancelling at the last minute every time.  Out of all the 70 apps I have on my Oculus -- Spatial is the worst one, the least professional, and the most buggy.  I hate it to no degree.  If you want to get really stressed out then try Spatial!

developer_response.body:
Hi - we appreciate you trying Spatial and are sorry you had a negative experience. We've experienced significant user growth in a short period of time and are dealing with those growing pains. 

We hope you don't actually think Spatial is the worst app you've ever tried. I know it can be easy when you're frustrated to submit an angry review. But behind this little store portal is a team of 20 or so people pouring their blood sweat and tears into making something the world hasn't seen before, and offering it to everyone for free.

If you're willing to give us a second chance, please feel free to shoot me a note directly at jacob@spatial.io. I'd love to help you sort through your issues. 

- Jacob Loewenstein, Spatial's Head of Business

reviews.review_title: The Future is here and in Spatial.
reviews.review_description: I have been using this platform since February 2020.  I have probably been in over 200 meetings in this app.  Using at least 6 different types of hardware to experience it.  Currently, my company provides custom content for business applications.  It's really revolutionary and while it works as as promised you can see that it is only going to get better as the newer hardware and refined user interfaces are already improving the experiences.  Spatial is really the fore-barer of how we will communicate, collaborate, and connect with each other in the future.  But you can use it now. If I were you, I would get started right away.

We have been really impressed with the virtual forum Spatial provides for business meetings and get-togethers.  The integrations with Slack, Google Drive (on way), in-app web browsers, webcams make the environment seem all very familiar in a virtual & augmented way.  The ability to manipulate 3D and pdf files in the room and upload other files as well as screen-share are really useful. Whiteboarding and post-it note functionality make it really useful for brainstorming.  We look forward to working with Spatial to make this a go-to forum for business meetings in the virtual world.  The integration with Quest is impeccable and we hope this continues with Quest 2.

It’s not my favorite but I can see people liking this a few problems the movement I do not like the teleporting I would rather walk and the turning is very fast make it a bit smoother and the objects I made a paper airplane and I threw it and it froze in the air :(

developer_response.body:
Hi there JWB78games, thank you for sharing your feedback regarding our movement system.  We hope to be able to accommodate all movement styles in the future.  At this time, Spatial does not have any physics for objects yet, but this is something that we’re working on.  

Please send us any other feedback or suggestions you have to support@spatial.io 

Cheers,
The Spatial Team

reviews.review_description: CAN U MAKE A NFT ON THIS APP?

We have been using Spatial every day for team meetings and other social events at LARVOL. I have even talked directly with the Spatial team to ask questions and get more information. They have been incredibly responsive and helpful! I can't wait to keep exploring the possibilities of Spatial and the future of what will be possible with such an innovative tool!

I use Oculus Quest2.

(1)I frequently fail to join rooms. After seeing "Connecting to voice channel. Hang tight" I fail to enter the room with the message "Join room failed unexpectedly".

(2)Another error happens sometimes. Though I joined a room successfully, I keep seeing "connecting to voice channel" in the air and can't communicate with others using voice.

developer_response.body: Hi! So sorry about the issues you're experiencing, please contact support@spatial.io and we can get you sorted! :)

reviews.review_description: I have been working with Spatial for the past 6 weeks and in that time i have created several rooms including an Art Gallery.  As a full time resident artist in PA.   Spatial creating a custom gallery environment was a godsend.  Once i was able to set up my work in the VR space it became apparant the strenght of the program as well as the dedication of the spatial team to engage with the public and offer their support for anyone trying to use their product.   I have been able to get 5 artist friends to purchase Oculus Quest 2 headset just by giving them a basic tour in Spatial alone.  The looks on their face when they realized they could show their works with anyone, anywhere,  real time and talk with clients and critics were priceless.  Any sort of collaboration that a company or organization hopes to achieve is increased exponentially with the ability to gather together and work with 3d models and share content from anywhere.  This is far and away the most immersive experience i have had in VR.  I recommend you download it and start inviting friends into the spaces and start coming up with grand ideas and execute them.  The Spatial team will be there as you do
hello

reviews.review_title: Spatial is out of this world!
reviews.review_description: Spatial has been on my radar for the last few months, but I've been actively using it for just over a month now and seeing the platform grow and gain new features with each iteration is amazing! As someone new to the VR space, I was a little intimidated and afraid to get started, however, Spatial is very intuitive and user friendly. I was also blown away by all the features, especially the numerous integrations such as Google Drive, Figma & Slack!! I am a huge fan of the custom environments and have enjoyed testing those out too! Kudos to the Spatial team for doing an incredible job constantly innovating and creating the smoothest and best user experience!

Puts me in a mandatory unskippable tutorial every time I start and then pops up 20 uncloseable windows. No guidance on how to get the code to link to a space. Camera interface on browser doesn't work during avatar creation even though camera is on. Just wasted 30 minutes of my life simply trying to get into a meeting and then gave up after being dumped into the tutorial again.  Worst piece of crap ever built - deleting and burning with fire

developer_response.body:
Hi Scrappity,
Thank you so much for your feedback, and we sincerely apologize that you experienced these glitches. We did just launch completely new avatars (with legs and custom clothes!) last week, and a whole new onboarding experience. We hope you can give us another try and believe you'll have a better experience this time around. 

If you continue to encounter an experience that's not up to your expectations, please contact our team at Support@spatial.io.

Cheers,
The Spatial Team

If you’re able to contact support@spatial.io someone from our team will assist you ASAP.

Cheers,
The Spatial Team

reviews.review_description: Love the rooms and art galleries. They are great experiences but I often find that I’m lagging, frame rate is low, and controls could be better. I’m keeping an eye on this app as it has so much potential
What is it like

I persuaded a friend to download the app, they couldn't join and felt it was very stressful trying to delete their profile and personal info after signing up. I don't like giving 1 star reviews but I feel this should be easy and don't like how see felt held to ransom by the app.

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry you found the experience stressful :( We'd love for you to give Spatial another try but if not, we're happy to help you delete your profile if you shoot us a note at support@spatial.io.
